titleStmt.title: SII 20.102: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 102. (B.K. No. 48 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 7, Paridhāvi, Jyēṣhṭha, puṇṇame, Wednesday, corresponding to A.D. 1132, May 31. The weekday was, however Tuesday.

The inscription states the rules for constructing houses (in the temple site) made by Indrakīrti-paṇḍita, the āchārya of Māhāsthāna Goggiya-basadi, perggaḍe Malliyaṇṇa, the dēvaputrakas and the aruvattokkalu headed by Lakkiseṭṭi. It also records a gift of land to the pūjāri of the basadi by Hēmadēvabādya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[©] svasti śrīmaccāḷukkyavīrabhūlōkavarṣada 7 neya paridhāvi saṁ
vatsarada jyēṣṭhada puṇnami budhavāradaṁdu śrīmahāsthānaṁ goggi
ya basadiyācāryyariṁdrakīrttipaṁḍitarumavara perggaḍe malliyaṁ
ṇanu mukhyavāgi samasta dēvaputrakaruṁ lakkiseṭṭi modalāgi ta
ḷamumaṟuvattokkalumirddu māḍida vyavasteyenteṁdoḍe prajegaḷu
maneyaṁ māḍisidoḍaṁ manesāmyadavaremma maneyeṁdu mū
ṟuvarṣadoḷage baṁdarappaḍavara kayyalu māḍisidupakṣayakkimma
ḍiyaṁ koṇḍu biḍuvaralliṁ mēle māḍisidavarggā mane paricchēdavaṁgaḍi mane sāmya
davarttāvu māḍadeyuṁ peṟara māḍalīyyadeyumirddarappaḍaṁgaḍiyakke ma
neyakke bīḷsidhāyamaṁ tiṟuvaru mūṟuvarṣadiṁ baḷikkoḍeyare baṁdu kā
ḍidarappaḍe śrī ballavarasarāṇe piriyarasiyarāṇe . © . śrī goggiya
basadiya pūjāri dharmmayange hēmadēvabādyaru dhārapūrvvaka
vāgi koṭṭa keyi mattaru 2 . nakharaṁgaḷa Ayinūrbbara samakṣadalli koṭa
du . pūjārikege 1. © .The numeral1 is engraved below the line.
Digital edition of SII 20.102 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
